projectDescription: A Google Colab-based bacterial whole genome sequencing (WGS) pipeline that automates read trimming, QC, and de novo assembly for paired-end and single-end FASTQ data.
keyFeatures: Google Colab notebook — no local installation required
Supports both paired-end (PE) and single-end (SE) FASTQ inputs
Quality control with FastQC and MultiQC
De novo assembly via Unicycler (PE) and SPAdes (SE)
Optional LIGHT database downloader for CGE databases (ResFinder, MLST, PlasmidFinder, etc.)
Exports all results as a timestamped ZIP archive
publicApiSurface: MODE: SINGLE_SAMPLE | SAMPLESHEET — selects input mode
R1_PATH, R2_PATH — paired-end FASTQ input paths
DATA_DIR — directory containing FASTQ files for batch mode
RUN_DB_DOWNLOAD — boolean flag to trigger database downloads
DB_ROOT — root path for database storage (Google Drive recommended)
THREADS_ASSEMBLY — number of threads for assembly step
Samplesheet columns: sample, read_type, r1, r2
